CustomField.formula: AND( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Property__r.Include_on_Tracker__c=true, OR( TEXT(Tracker_Status__c) ='Primary', TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Backup', TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Flagged', TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Hidden', AND(TEXT(Tracker_Status__c)='Removed', Move_to_Removed_Report__c = false)), Priority_Calc__c != 1000, NOT(TEXT( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Current Owner'), NOT(TEXT( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Current Renter'), NOT(TEXT( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c )='Past Renter'), NOT(TEXT( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c )=''), NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT( Service_File__r.HOMEtracker__Status__c ),'Withdrawn')) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated from Service File Status Fields.
CustomField.label: Available for Tracker
